candidates.why: A generic operating 'Depreciation' row is visible, but it is not labelled as production/cost of revenues/COGS-related and appears outside the selected COGS component rows ('Production costs' and 'Depletion costs'). No explicit COGS-specific D&A row is shown in the operating section excerpt.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket is visible. To avoid double counting, do not add generic 'Depreciation' to COGS.

candidates.why: A separate 'Depreciation' row is visible among operating-expense-type lines, but it is generic and most likely a component already embedded within the previously selected parent SG&A row ('General and administrative expenses'), rather than a same-level add-back line clearly outside that bucket.

variables.notes: Conservative treatment: the visible 'Depreciation' line is not clearly a separate same-level SG&A D&A summary that should be added on top of the selected 'General and administrative expenses' row. No explicit amortisation/depreciation-in-SG&A label is shown.
